payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Fantastic. Thank you, Taliesin. Also, apparently, Twitch has extended Sub-tember all the way to Sub-tober! Or at least, up until Twitch Con, which is in a few weeks. So if you're a first time sub, you get half off for a few more weeks on every channel. If you want to support this or any of your other favorite channels on Twitch, now is the time to do it before this goes away, or it becomes Sub-Vember. So check it out, and awesome! That is all of our announcements, guys.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We do. It's October, which is wonderful and great. We're going to be covering monsters. We're doing monster books. We're going to be talking about the origins of Groot and some of the big creepy monsters of yesteryear, and some modern creepy monster books. I, Vampire, and etc. Fun.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Ooh, nice. So you five look up to see an unconscious little girl, of human and elven descent. Velora floats, encased within the ribcage of the avatar form. She appears to be in some sort of a trance and is held by nothing but air and energy. A terrible familiar smile creeps across the face, his thin mummified lips curling into an impossibly long exaggerated smile that defies the constraints of the skull that held it. "I was curious who would seek my blessing first. You all have proven driven enough to deserve the personal touch of my wrath. When I discovered your wily tricks merely shifting about beneath my nose, the humor of it was not lost on me. This omniscience is still new. I learned to push my limits with each passing moment. I thank you for showing me. I reward you by sharing with you the ruin of this once beautiful city, a familiar oblivion to you each, now perfected." I would like you all to please place yourselves.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Who is it, though?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Nine.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Natural 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Eight.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Yeah. So even the community helped. So to give you some perspective in size to his newly ascended avatar form, all of his power focused into a single, physical entity, that is the Vecna produced since the Ritual of Seeding.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: No, I wanted to hover like five feet above--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: To this side? Because you have your wings out, sure. I'll let you get there.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Trinket is going to stay right at the entrance.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Right there?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Good boy.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Guard that entrance.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: He's just waiting to see what's going on.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: This is fine.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What the fuck is that?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That's amazing.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can you see this, Ash?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I just see a lot of swirls.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Ash, I'm going to take a picture and send it to you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Make sure you get his good side.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh man, he looks so cool.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Did you do this, Matthew? You made this, didn't you? You painted it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well, I had friends help me, because I've been planning a wedding.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Before he started, that was Optimus Prime. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That was actually converted from my Critter gift a while back.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Really?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: I would like you all to roll initiative. (screaming)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So I'll say over here?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'll be next to Grog.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Where's Vex now? She's over there? I'm going to go to the side of this glowy thing. Can I get there?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can get about this far. For just the ascension.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to be close to Grog, too.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: The action that I held coming up the stairs. Can I cast Enlarge?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'll say you can do that as he's speaking.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Can I get any farther with my wings out? I popped them out before we came up.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Then (whooshing). There's Grog. We'll say you can get, for the sake of placement, about 20 feet up.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: No, I wanted to hover like five feet above--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: To this side? Because you have your wings out, sure. I'll let you get there.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Trinket is going to stay right at the entrance.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Right there?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Good boy.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Guard that entrance.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: He's just waiting to see what's going on.

preceding_turns.text: This is fine.

preceding_turns.text: Oh my god!

preceding_turns.text: What the fuck is that?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That's amazing.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can you see this, Ash?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I just see a lot of swirls.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Ash, I'm going to take a picture and send it to you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Make sure you get his good side.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh man, he looks so cool.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Did you do this, Matthew? You made this, didn't you? You painted it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well, I had friends help me, because I've been planning a wedding.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Before he started, that was Optimus Prime. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That was actually converted from my Critter gift a while back.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Really?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. So even the community helped. So to give you some perspective in size to his newly ascended avatar form, all of his power focused into a single, physical entity, that is the Vecna produced since the Ritual of Seeding.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Shit.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: There you go. All right. That ends your turn, Pike. Up to the top of the round, it is now Vecna's turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I'd like to move again.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. You've moved about 40 feet so what's your flying speed?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's 40, isn't it?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Probably. Know what? I'm going to stay because I don't know what my fucking speed is because I'm panicking now.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's okay. I'm pretty sure--

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I actually don't think I have that sheet.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's okay, I have it right here. Blessing of the Everlight. Yep. Flying speed of 40 feet. So you've moved your maximum speed while flying and you've used your action to cast. You can't move any further.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Do you have a bonus action you want to do?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Let's see here. Yeah, okay. So I am going to cast Shield of Faith onto Vex, which gives a plus two bonus to AC.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, great. Thanks, Pike.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: You're welcome! Yeah, I forgot to get that sheet when I was home, of the Blessing of the-- wings. Wonderful wings.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: I mean, it would have taken a couple rounds, but you've already made your choices.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: So it was--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What's the fly speed of the eagle?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Giant eagle is 80 feet.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: So it's 40.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And you used half your movement, so you can get 20 feet up, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's cool, next round you can do it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Next round I can get close.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Next round he can leap off you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: We'll put you there and we'll say you're at 20 feet. I'll acknowledge that here.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh no!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: (screeches)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I need to put tape on the eagle. I can fix that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Do you want to hand me that-- Oh, you already got tape, you're prepared.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I came prepared. All righty.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We're like an 80s B-level fantasy movie right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: This is amazing, Matt.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's beautiful.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I've seen buffets that are uglier than this.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well thank you. Wait until the battle's over before you thank me.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Wait, what?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: No, no, that's fine. I mean, Bigby's Hand couldn't have moved down and gotten Grog and gone back up, right?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You watch as some of his wounds begin to seal up. Looking at him, you get a sense that he heals roughly, we'll say for the sake of this, because it's the end of the game, why not. Heals 50 hit points a round.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's the only thing that gives us a fighting chance.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're a little higher there, Vax.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: And I'll dump Smite into it, as well.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go for it. So what's the total on that one, the damage you just did?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I didn't do any damage yet. (adding) Good.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We get all three in, and then we get one round.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: So if we got two in, then he would have to save over 20, so he would have to roll a ten or higher.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Which is so easy.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We have a 50/50 shot if we get two in him.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What are you doing?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: And if we get three in him, 75% chance?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, but he can still save from it if he rolls a 16, 17, 18, 19, or 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: And you've got to assume that he's got some feat that can get him a ten whenever he wants, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm calculating shit. I'm scared to death.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: This is, it's hard to do.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Critters, we love you. Thanks for watching the show.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Bonus action, I'm going to take a superior healing potion. So that's 8d4?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 8d4 plus eight, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Mercer, at the end of my turn, the stun fades? Or at the end of the round? I don't get a reaction or anything?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I would say it goes through the full round, it would be at the next round I'd say.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so I'm back up to 67 hit points. Fuck. Oh! No, stun, there's nothing you can do to take the effect of stun away, is there?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes, Greater Restoration.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, that's it? Not Lesser?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I don't think Lesser gets rid of stun, unfortunately.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Fuck me. Okay. All righty. I'm going to fly up to Scanlan, and I'm going to cast Cure Wounds at 4th-level. That's 4d8 plus my wisdom. Oh, that's good! 14, 21, 27. 27 plus three. 30 points healed!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: May I do a cantrip on her? Minor Illusion, just to turn her skin green. (laughter)

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: I'd say handing it over point-to-point, I'll allow it to be part of an action because he's right next to you and he's capable now.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Scanlan, your turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: My turn? I've already inspired Grog.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Hold for Pike.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'll hold for Pike.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, what are you holding?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to hold the book! And I will inspire Pike.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, that's good.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Man, he's looking way too smug.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, he's got one legendary resistance left. He's been saving it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'll inspire Pike, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. So Pike, take your inspiration die. What do you say to Pike?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I will sing to her  (singing) She's a good girl. (groaning)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That's it. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (singing) Loves her Scanlan.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty. Pike, it's your turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: JOE
preceding_turns.text: (singing) Loves chicken.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: No. Let's not do it. Okay. Passing over the trammel to Grog, is that a bonus action, or that's my action? Because I'm right next to him?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You get roughly to the edge here with your 50 movement. I'll say you can land. Sure. I'll allow it. Okay. That ends your turn. Vax, you're up.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: As in, don't use the book?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: As in, don't keep attacking him.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: As in don't kill him.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: If we keep attacking him, he's going to take too much damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: The trammels are in.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: The two trammels are in? He has one more legendary save.

preceding_turns.speaker: JOE
preceding_turns.text: Read the book.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Literally, it's all we got.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's Reading Rainbow time.

preceding_turns.speaker: JOE
preceding_turns.text: Time to cross the streams.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: If we're not careful, this gets worse.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Is someone before me?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Grog, that ends your turn. Vex, you're up.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We're all before you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What's your hit points at now, Scanlan?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm fine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Just tell us what your hit points are.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: 106. I'm fine.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to cast Cure Wounds on Scanlan at 3rd-level. 19 plus three is 22 hit points, and I'm going to fly down next to Percy.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: It's still glowing. The text is glowing for an hour.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: This just means we have to live through one roll. I'm holding my action for any movement or anything that he may do. I'm holding my action for signs of life.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Scanlan, it's your turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Chapter One  The rites of banishment are ancient and powerful. They cannot be stopped by anyone, not even a god. I read. I read powerfully and strong.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. He's going to make his wisdom saving throw with a DC 20 because of two trammels. That is a 17. He's going to use his last legendary resistance to succeed.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Next round.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The text goes blurred to you on the book, so you cannot read it for a full round. Somebody else could.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: A full round.

preceding_turns.speaker: JOE
preceding_turns.text: What is the basis of reading that thing?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Someone needs to cast a 3rd-level spell on it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I have 3rd-levels left.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Top of the round. Vecna's turn. Legendary actions are returned. At this point now, the titan has waded into the center of Vasselheim. Each progressive round, it's been this one footstep after the other. You can hear screams and yells, but you also see the divine temples in the distance are beginning to summon various bits of divine energy from those in the clerics that reside within the city. You can see a storm has now merged with the darkness that Vecna has spread over the city, and lightning bolts are beginning to be brought down in a familiar crack that you heard when you were battling Groon. As you can see now, the acolytes of the recently fallen Trial Forge are bringing their rage down upon the exterior of this entire swarm of gloomstalkers and the titan. Vecna is going to try again. He's going to cast another Banishment on Scanlan. "Would you just be rid of me, finally? Go! Die!" Make another charisma saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Okay. I'm going to float by Keyleth.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What are you doing?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to float by Keyleth. Cast Guidance on her.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: And as a bonus action, cast Sanctuary on her.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. All right. That finish your turn, Pike?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Can I move again?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can move if you want.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I want to move close to Grog.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. That's easy enough. You guys are all clustered around him. Okay. That ends Pike's turn. End of your turn, he's going to use two more legendary actions to attempt to cast 4th-level Banishment on Scanlan. He's running through what things he can.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: 4th-level Banishment on Scanlan?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. Make a charisma saving throw, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Come on, charisma.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Burt Reynolds, do it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: 30. I'm charisma as fuck! (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: JOE
preceding_turns.text: This is craziness!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: First roll two. Second roll 18.

preceding_turns.speaker: JOE
preceding_turns.text: We got to go to Vegas after this is done!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Without even the mental strength, the emotional strength to take in the ramifications of what just transpired, you all look to each other in this moment of victory. A year's journey. And you breathe a sigh of relief, true relief. And that's where we're going to end tonight's game. We'll pick up on this next week. Holy shit, you guys.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. I go up to Vax. Palm over to him.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The hand did come off, actually. The body vanished, but the hand, the artifact still remains behind.

preceding_turns.speaker: JOE
preceding_turns.text: Then it's time to destroy this thing once and for all. I kneel down, and I place the hand down on the ground. I raise my axe above my head and I say a prayer to Tiamat. And I bring the axe down and chop my hand off, put Vecna's hand on, use my healing pool to heal, and teleport out. I'm sorry, it was just business. Until we meet again.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Wait. What?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Did we just get janked? We just got robbed! It's hard to get out of here, isn't it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (laughing) You guys watch as Arkhan--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: See you in the next campaign, motherfucker!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Power move!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Okay, that just happened.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: All right, you know. Yeah. Don't congratulate him! Don't encourage that!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That punch was super close.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: But he would have still been a god, technically?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Ugh.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We would have had to have done five more games for this thing to end.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This would have gone into a few more sessions, and he would have come back with far more knowledge and far more preparation before he's up against you guys.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, nope.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Everyone was clutch. Pike.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, everyone.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Keyleth for the win. The most wisdom she's ever had. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: In another form. Can read all languages.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Sam. You were trying to save a Wish for me?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Matt!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, the gnarliest map of all time.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'm glad that worked out. (applause)
